evals.prompt: How do I set up a welcome sequence in Kit for new subscribers?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to creating a Sequence in Kit and connecting it to a form via Visual Automation

assertions.name: mentions_sequences
assertions.description: Explains Kit Sequences as the drip campaign feature

assertions.name: mentions_visual_automation
assertions.description: Recommends connecting the sequence to a form subscribe trigger via Visual Automation

assertions.name: mentions_plan_requirement
assertions.description: Notes that sequences require the Creator plan or above (not available on free Newsletter plan)

evals.prompt: I want to sell my ebook through Kit Commerce. How do I set it up?
evals.expected_output: Guide to setting up a digital product in Kit Commerce with Stripe, landing page, and post-purchase automation

assertions.name: mentions_stripe
assertions.description: States that Stripe connection is required for Kit Commerce

assertions.name: mentions_product_creation
assertions.description: Walks through creating a product in Earn → Products

assertions.name: mentions_transaction_fee
assertions.description: Notes the 0.6% Kit transaction fee on sales

evals.prompt: How do I use the Kit API to bulk import subscribers with tags?
evals.expected_output: API guide for bulk subscriber creation and tagging using Kit API v4

assertions.name: mentions_v4_api
assertions.description: Uses the v4 API at api.kit.com, not the deprecated v3

assertions.name: mentions_rate_limit
assertions.description: Notes the 120 requests per 60 seconds rate limit
